role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral; did not hallucinate scripts.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns (Soviet blocks vs gardens).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed tree species (Acer/Tilia) and garden types, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (road shoulders, utility poles) and building styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture + fencing + poles) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region and country. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing consistent evidence. The final decision was driven by the meta-agent's synthesis of architectural and infrastructural cues, which is appropriate for this type of visual ambiguity.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain and deciduous trees match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of broadleaf trees and garden plots match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of road shoulders and utility poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of apartment block style and fencing match the image.
